title: PCCF in Kawrthah Forest Division a tlawh
content:
305/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 28th of April,2026:Ni 24th April - 25th Aprril,2026 khan Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari, IFS,Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (PCCF),Environment, Forests & Climate Change Department, Mizoram chuan Kawrthah Forest Division a tlawh a, field-a hnathawh dan thlirletna te, harsatna awm zirchianna te, ramngaw humhalh leh enkawlnaa tha zawka a kal theih nan hmalak zel dan tur a sawipui.

24th April khan Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari chuan Darlak Central Nursery a tlawh a, hna thawh mek te enfiahin chumi hnuah Kawrthah-a Division Headquarters a tlawh a, DFO Kawrthah te nen department hnathawh leh hmunhma te an tlawh a ni.

Kanhmun Range-ah Mualmam-a CAMPA ANR plantation a tlawh a,Division-in thingphun leh ramngaw siam tharna kawnga hma a lakna chu fakawm a ti.He hunah hian Division-in harsatna a tawh hrang hrang te,Luimawi leh Bungthuam khua, ramri bula teak kih ruk leh tawlh ruk chungchanga harsatna awm te a hmuna kalin a enfiah.

Mizoram-Assam ramri Medili bial pawh tlawh in, ramri buai dinhmun leh a hmunhma te a enfiah bawk. Zamuang-a mimal teak huan, conditional felling scheme hnuaia ram surrender hmasa ber neihna hmun a tlawh a,he hmun hi department plantation atana siam that leh thing phun lehna tura hmalak mek a ni.

Pu Rajeev Kumar Tiwari hian Rengdil (Lungkulh Biodiversity Hotspot) tlawhin biodiversity hausakna leh eco-tourism tih hmasawnna lama hmalakna kal mek chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DDMC Chairman-in Lunglei District chhunga zirna inte tan ni 28.04.2026 (Thawhlehni) sikul chawlh a puang
content:
304/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 28:India Meteorological Department (IMD)-in khaw chin a thlir lawknaah April ni 28, 2026 (Thawhlehni) hian Lunglei District-ah thlipui leh ruahpui thawk tura a sawi lawk angin leh Lunglei District chhungah khua a la chhiat chhunzawm reng avangin, chhiatna nasa zawk thleng palh thei lakah mipui, a bik takin sikul naupangte an him theih nan Pi Navneet Mann, Deputy Commissioner & Chairman, Lunglei District Disaster Management Committee chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 30(v) tlawh chhanin, "Ni 28.04.2026 (Thawhlehni) hian Lunglei District chhunga zirna in zawng zawng khar tur a ni" tih thupek a chhuah.

Attachment
